---
title: "Create Statistical Plots"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
pre {
  max-height: 300px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

pre[class] {
  max-height: 300px;
}
```

```{r eval=T, echo=F, message = F, warning = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(medicaldata)
library(ggstatplot)
```

## Overview of `ggstatplot`

The `ggstatplot` is an extension package of `ggplot2` for adding statistical results to ggplot objects.

```{r}
library(ggstatsplot)
```
